question: Which business segment of JnJ will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward?
gold_answer: The Consumer Health business segment will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward.
predicted: The Consumer Health business will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward. This business was separated from Johnson & Johnson through the completion of an exchange offer to finalize the separation of Kenvue Inc., Johnson & Johnson's former Consumer Health business. The company will present Consumer Health business financial results as discontinued operations, including a gain of approximately $20 billion in the third quarter of 2023.
reasoning: The fetched pages clearly state that Johnson & Johnson's Consumer Health business (which was separated as Kenvue Inc.) will be presented as discontinued operations from August 30, 2023 onward.
label: AL
